textByHash.a266c3bec366da4acb5d6b280e7163fea678bbbc: There was an awful storm, worst we've ever seen. The combination of cold and wind as well as its great age just... well... you only have to look around to find pieces.
textByHash.6488cfcf2b8efa39d2d4ebe8257c21a8a4eeda72: I was, but I can't do it alone. Architects from all five cities have been working on individual projects to improve the roads around the kingdom,
textByHash.66999ec1f57417fe43de37620aa1b99a68b0c3f5: but now we're done and I hoped that they might come to help with the statue.
textByHash.58237139de8bda7468dbfd1f063bde2f28af9ccd: Would you? The others... they refuse to talk to me.
textByHash.5b3814b3137951ad89fc1944bec014abe7b3983d: Yes indeed. If you could call together the architects from all five cities to co-operate on this statue - that will be something that has never happened before...
textByHash.693eba510eb274eaed98a2dd1159eb33653f9456: Sadly you are not favoured by the citizens of Hosidius. When you are, come back to me and I'll help.
textByHash.f4eeb2090394b5584e8bbdda27fc85f0945434c4: That's all very well, but I would lose face with my people if I were to actively assist someone who was not favoured.
textByHash.545494b9508787d1c1d3832d84bccdc35ea273a7: Until we have architects skilled in all areas of the statue, we cannot proceed.
textByHash.5824b39092630f68df9e752321034e4be4cad3ab: You'll find them all at home, in their respective cities.
textByHash.6bb91edd01f93e4116682d9dd38f15eae3fc47ea: Sadly you are not favoured by the citizens of Hosidius. When you are, come back to me and I'll help too.
textByHash.8d037bd271585ddf1b2b896d0af5635dd06e57e4: Thanks for helping us all get together to finally build this statue! I've got something for you...
textByHash.780c4cdb5ef7c2cd0f3f44622e9cbaeffd0a3fa1: I've had this lamp for a while, but it'll serve you more good than it does for me.
